model_essays.title: 华明——多功能国际贸易公司（公司简介手册）
model_essays.text:
华明国际贸易公司是一多功能的中外合资贸易公司。华明不仅是您的贸易伙伴，还可以在技术及管理的市场开发和高科技的引进方面与您合作。

公司简介
• 名称：华明国际贸易公司
• 成立日期：1997年10月
• 注册资金：1250万美元
• 出资比例：中国大华集团50%，美国BH公司25%，日本山田会社25%
• 办公地址：上海东方商业中心35楼
• 电话：6454-8888
• 董事长：万林（中方），副董事长：山田中本（日方）Jack Smith（美方）

业务范围
• 出口商品的国内购买
• 进口商品的国内批发交易
• 技术的进出口贸易
• 进料加工
• 三来一补（来料、来样、来件加工，补偿贸易）
model_essays.summary: Company profile brochure for Huaming International Trade Co., a Sino-foreign joint venture, covering founding details, ownership structure, and business scope.
model_essays.why_study: Authentic model of the standard Chinese company brochure (公司简介) format: a one-line mission statement with 不仅…还 structure, followed by bulleted 公司简介 and 业务范围 sections. Highly imitable for professional self-introductions or capability statements.
key_devices: 不仅…还… to enumerate multiple capabilities in a single opening sentence
Bullet-point 公司简介 with standardized fields (名称、成立日期、注册资金、出资比例、地址、电话、董事长)
业务范围 section uses parallel noun-phrase bullets ending in action nominals (加工、贸易、交易)
三来一补: set trade-policy term worth memorizing as a collocated unit

model_essays.title: 拜访综合业务部——国际贸易方式与程序（对话，第二课）
model_essays.text:
（张先生陪同学习班的师生来到综合业务部，把他们介绍给该部的陈经理。）

张先生：老陈，我把这些客人交给你了，你向他们介绍一下你们部门的情况吧。
陈经理：行，你忙去吧。
陈经理：一看综合贸易部的名字大家就知道，我们不但经营范围广，而且产品多。简单来说，我们用代理、自营、转口贸易的方式，经营各种技术、服务、商品的进出口。同时，我们也承办来料加工，来样加工，来件加工，并且可以接受海内外企业的委托，作为他们在国际和国内市场上的销售代理。
玛丽：您提到了代理、自营、转口三种贸易方式，我不太清楚。能举例说明吗？
陈经理：当然可以。我们能代理海内外企业，办理进出口手续，签订、执行进出口合同，这是代理贸易。做代理贸易，商品的所有权不属于我们，进出口交易的盈亏也跟我们公司无关，我们只收取代理费。自营贸易就不同了，我们可以根据对市场的判断，购销商品，商品的所有权属于我们，我们需要承担所有的风险和盈亏。至于转口贸易，简单来说，就是一个国家从另一个国家进口，然后又出口到第三国去。
大卫：国际贸易的手续很复杂吗？
陈经理：每笔生意的情况不同，但是也有一定的规律。拿进出口来说，一笔生意的成交一般要经过三个阶段：准备阶段、协商和签订合同阶段、以及履行合同阶段。在第一阶段，要了解国际市场的需求，买卖双方建立业务关系。在第二阶段，双方商定贸易条件，并签订书面合同。在第三阶段，双方要履行合同。如果你们有兴趣，可以看一下出口业务程序图，就会对交易的过程比较清楚了。
玛丽：中国在2001年加入了世界贸易组织，这对你们的进出口业务有什么影响？
陈经理：世贸一直促进贸易自由化，减少贸易保护主义。这非常有利于我们的业务发展。我们希望今年的贸易额能超过去年的。
大卫：祝你们成功！
陈经理：谢谢。
model_essays.summary: Manager Chen explains the three modes of trade (agency, proprietary, transit), the three stages of a transaction, and the impact of WTO accession on business.
model_essays.why_study: Dense model of formal spoken explanation in a professional setting. Shows how to define technical terms (代理贸易/自营贸易/转口贸易) using real examples, how to enumerate procedural stages, and how to pivot from one topic to another using 至于 and 拿…来说. The register sits at the oral-written boundary—ideal for business presentations.
key_devices: 不但…而且… to establish scope and depth simultaneously
简单来说 to introduce a layman-accessible definition
至于X，简单来说，就是… — the formal topic-shift + plain-language definition pattern
拿X来说 to introduce an illustrative example
一般要经过三个阶段：A、B、以及C — numbered stage enumeration with 以及 before the final item
有利于 + VP to state strategic benefit

model_essays.title: 拜访华明国际贸易公司（对话，第一课）
model_essays.text: （玛丽和大卫在美国某商学院主修国际商务。为了进一步了解中国的商业发展，他们参加了在上海举办的

暑期学习班。除了上课以外，学习班还经常安排学生去各商业机构参观访问。今天，王老师带他们来到了华明国际贸易公司。）

王老师：我来介绍一下，这是来自美国的玛丽和大卫。这是华明公司的张先生。
玛丽和大卫：您好，张先生。
张先生：你们好。欢迎来华明公司参观。我先来介绍一下公司的情况。我们公司是1997年成立的，主要经营国际贸易。成立以来，进出口贸易额年年增加，今年上半年就达到了六千万美元。这是公司的简介，有空你们可以看看。
玛丽：华明是国有公司吧？
张先生：不，我们是一家合资公司，正副董事长来自中日美三家公司。
王老师：随着经济改革，中国的企业体制也有所改变，现在除了国有企业以外，还有许多三资企业。
玛丽：什么是三资？
王老师：就是外资、合资、独资。华明就是三国合资建立的国际贸易公司。
张先生：我们公司是进出口都做，方式比较灵活，因此生意越做越大。我们先去参观一下综合业务部吧，这个部门的经营范围比较广。
王老师：好吧，如果有问题，我们可以边走边谈。
model_essays.summary: Initial visit to Huaming company; Zhang introduces the company's history and joint-venture structure, Wang explains enterprise ownership types (国有/合资/独资).
model_essays.why_study: Illustrates formal Chinese social introductions in a business context and how to give a rapid, spoken company overview. Also shows how professional vocabulary (三资企业, 体制, 有所改变) appears naturally in explanation-mode speech.
key_devices: 我来介绍一下 — standard opener for third-party introductions
成立以来，…年年增加，今年上半年就达到了… — trajectory + milestone formula for company introductions
随着X，Y也有所改变 — linking macro trend to micro result
进出口都做，方式比较灵活，因此生意越做越大 — causal chain using 因此 and 越…越…

model_essays.title: 有关人士指出：中国电子商务发展受四大瓶颈制约（报刊文章，第四课）
model_essays.text:
有关人士指出：中国电子商务发展受四大瓶颈制约

华声报讯：电子商务近来在中国的一些大城市发展迅猛，电子商务站纷纷设立。但是有关人士指出，中国电子商务发展受四大
的问题。中国大多数企业没有认识到发展电子商务的必要性，上网企业数少。
的问题。中国目前个人计算机的市场持有量仅为1500万台，其中还有一部分是不能上网的计算机，平均到每个企业和政府部门还不到一台。而且目前网络运行速度慢、网络资费贵。
的问题。一些网站在安全体系上没有设防，很容易受到黑客的攻击。

的问题。到目前为止中国有关电子商务的法律法规尚是一片空白，这也阻碍了电子商务的进一步发展。

（《华声报》电子版）
model_essays.summary: Newspaper report citing experts on four structural bottlenecks constraining China's e-commerce development: low awareness, infrastructure gaps, security vulnerabilities, and absent legal framework.
model_essays.why_study: Authentic journalistic Chinese with a clean four-point analytical structure. The
template is a directly reusable macro-structure for any analytical or problem-diagnosis essay. Dense with useful formal vocabulary (制约, 纷纷, 持有量, 设防, 尚是一片空白).
key_devices: 之一/二/三/四 as section headers — numbered-bottleneck analytical template
没有解决
的问题 — framing each problem as an unresolved question in quotes
尚是一片空白 — formal idiom for 'still completely absent/blank'
受…制约 — formal passive: 'constrained by'
纷纷 — distributive adverb: 'one after another / in rapid succession'
到目前为止 — formal temporal frame: 'up to the present'

model_essays.title: 商务部公布2002年出口额最大的200家企业名单（政府公告，第二课补充）
model_essays.text:
商务部公布2002年我国出口额最大的200家企业和进出口额最大的500家企业名单

商务部新闻办公室

商务部今天公布了2002年中国出口额最大的200家企业和进出口额最大的500家企业名单。

2002年全国出口额最大的200家企业和进出口额最大的500家企业排名反映出以下特点：

一、入选标准大幅提高。2002年出口额最大的200家企业的最低入选标准由上年的14,082万美元提高到17,172万美元，增加3,090万美元；平均出口规模由40,170万美元提高到48,088万美元，增加了7,918万美元。进出口额最大的500家企业的最低入选标准由上年的11,413万美元提高到14,181万美元，增加2,768万美元，平均进出口规模由43,180万美元提高到51,431万美元，增加8,251万美元。这说明了中国外经贸企业规模和实力的整体提升。

二、电子信息类企业排名提升较快。新入围或排名位次上升较快的企业，以电子信息类企业居多。出口额最大的200家中，超过三分之一的企业为电子信息类企业；前20名中，有一半为电子信息类企业。

三、外商投资企业比重增加。与上年相比，2002年有45家新企业进入出口额最大的200家行列，其中外商投资企业29家，占新增企业数的64.4%；在进出口额最大的500家中，有109家为新入围企业，其中外商投资企业占了66家，占60.6%。

四、入围企业主要集中于东部沿海地区。出口额最大的200家企业中，东部地区企业有159家，占79.5%；中西部地区7家，占3.5%；中央企业34家，占17%。进入进出口额最大的500家的东部地区企业有412家，占82.4%，中西部地区31家，占6.2%；中央企业57家，占11.4%。

本次排名以海关进出口统计数据为依据，参加排名的企业是具有进出口经营权的总公司，不仅包括总公司本部进出口额，而且也包括控股50%以上的子公司的进出口额。
model_essays.summary: Official Ministry of Commerce press release listing China's top export enterprises for 2002, noting four trends: higher entry thresholds, dominance of electronics firms, rising share of FIEs, and coastal concentration.
model_essays.why_study: Model of Chinese official announcement style (政府公告): numbered analytical points, systematic comparative statistics (由X提高到Y，增加Z), and closing methodological note. The structure (公布+日期+名单, 排名反映出以下特点, numbered points, 以…为依据 closing) is a direct template for formal reports.
key_devices: 排名反映出以下特点：一、二、三、四 — official numbered-feature analysis structure
由X提高到Y，增加Z — canonical formula for reporting change between two values
以X类企业居多 — formal: 'predominantly/mainly X-type enterprises'
与上年相比 — standard comparative temporal frame in official Chinese
以海关统计数据为依据 — 'based on / using X as the basis' (凭/根据/以…为依据 trio)
不仅…而且… in closing methodological note to specify scope

model_essays.title: 今年1—5月我国高新技术产品出口保持稳定增长（报刊文章，第二课补充）
model_essays.text:
今年1—5月我国高新技术产品出口保持稳定增长
（2003年6月12日）

据海关统计，1—5月我国高新技术产品进出口总额778.9亿美元，同比增长51.1%。其中，进口421.37亿美元，出口357.53亿美元，分别同比增长48.1%和55.1%，比全国外贸进口和出口增速高出2.6个百分点和20.8个百分点，占全国外贸进口和出口总额的27.45%和22.94%。全国高新技术产品出口增幅已经连续4年保持在30%以上。

我国高新技术产品50%以上的出口市场集中在美国、欧盟、日本等发达国家和地区，其中计算机和通信产品占95%，以加工贸易方式出口的产品达到近90%。主要出口企业是外商投资企业，此外，今年以来，私营企业出口高新技术产品增长近3倍。

我国从90年代中期加速发展高新技术产业，在满足国内市场需求的同时，以电子信息产品为代表的高新技术产品迅速走向国际市场。据海关统计，2002年高新技术产品出口首次超过纺织服装产品，成为我国第二大类出口产品，高新技术产品出口正成为我国国民经济发展与外贸出口的新亮点。
model_essays.summary: Statistical economic news article reporting China's high-tech export growth in early 2003, with breakdowns by product category, destination market, and enterprise ownership type.
model_essays.why_study: Authentic model of the Chinese economic statistics news report genre. Dense with reusable statistical-writing patterns: 同比增长、分别增长…和…、连续X年保持在…以上、以…为代表、正成为…新亮点. The closing paragraph moves from data to interpretation — a structure worth imitating.
key_devices: 据海关统计 — 'according to customs statistics' (据X统计 as citation frame)
同比增长X% — year-on-year growth (same period last year comparison)
分别同比增长X和Y — 'respectively grew X and Y year-on-year'
连续X年保持在Y以上 — 'maintained above Y for X consecutive years'
以X为代表的Y — 'Y, represented/typified by X'
首次超过… 成为… — 'surpassed X for the first time, becoming…' (milestone narrative)

grammar_patterns.explanation: Pronoun meaning 'a certain / some (unspecified)', used before nouns. The speaker either does not know or does not wish to reveal the specific referent. Common in formal writing, letters to the editor, and bureaucratic contexts.
examples: 他以前在上海某银行工作过。（He used to work at a certain bank in Shanghai.）
我们正和美国某公司在商谈。（We are currently in discussions with a certain American company.）
某些敏感技术的出口需要得到国家的批准。（The export of certain sensitive technologies requires state approval.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Fronted purpose clause: 'In order to [goal], [subject] does [action]'. The 为了 phrase always precedes the main clause. Extremely common in formal and business Chinese.
examples: 为了提高产品质量，公司决定进口先进的生产技术。（In order to improve product quality, the company decided to import advanced production technology.）
这些美国学生为了了解中国的商业情况，参观了许多商业机构。（These American students visited many business institutions in order to understand China's business practice.）
为了鼓励消费，一些商家设立了不同的礼券计划。（In order to encourage spending, some businesses set up various gift-voucher programs.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Prepositional phrase meaning 'along with / in pace with / as X [develops/changes]'. Signals that Y develops in parallel with X. Very common in formal written Chinese to describe co-evolving phenomena.
examples: 随着经济改革，商业经营的方式灵活了。（With economic reform, business practices became more flexible.）
随着国有企业的改革，中国的就业情况也改变了。（Along with the reform of state enterprises, employment conditions in China changed.）
随着进口额的增加，我们需要扩大国内批发市场。（As import volume increases, we need to expand the domestic wholesale market.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Written-register phrase meaning 'to some extent / somewhat'. Softens the assertion; the spoken equivalents are 有一点儿 or 稍微. Always modifies a monosyllabic or short verb (有所提高, 有所减少, 有所改变, 有所了解).
examples: 今年的出口额有所提高。（This year's export volume has increased to some extent.）
随着企业体制改革，合资公司有所增加。（With enterprise system reform, joint-venture companies have increased somewhat.）
去中国留学了一年以后，他对中国文化有所了解。（After studying in China for a year, he gained some understanding of Chinese culture.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Preposition meaning 'according to / based on / in line with'. Introduces the evidential or normative basis for the main clause action. Formal; widely used in contracts, reports, and business writing.
examples: 根据对国际市场的调查研究，我们制定了出口计划。（Based on international market research, we finalized the export plan.）
根据合同，买方必须在六月中开出信用证。（According to the contract, the buyer must open a Letter of Credit by mid-June.）
根据磋商，由买方投保。（In line with the negotiation, insurance is to be taken out by the buyer.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Formal topic-shifter meaning 'as to / as for / regarding'. Draws attention to a new sub-topic before commenting on it. More formal than 关于, and signals a pivot within an ongoing discussion rather than a new subject from the outside.
examples: 至于世贸的作用，根据世界经济的发展也有所改变。（As for the role of the WTO, it also changes in line with world economic development.）
至于转口贸易，简单来说，就是一个国家从另一个国家进口，然后又出口到第三国去。（As for transit trade, simply put, it is when a country imports from one country and then re-exports to a third.）
至于交易的盈亏，总是存在一定的风险。（As for the profit and loss of a deal, a certain risk always exists.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Spoken/semi-formal phrase meaning 'speaking of X / to take X as an example / as far as X is concerned'. Less formal than 至于; introduces a concrete example or specific domain to illustrate a general point.
examples: 拿业务范围来说，我们经营的产品很多。（Speaking of business scope, we deal in many products.）
拿进出口来说，一笔生意的成交一般要经过三个阶段。（Taking import/export as an example, clinching a deal generally involves three stages.）
拿国际贸易的方式来说，近几年越来越灵活了。（As far as international trade practice is concerned, it has become more flexible in recent years.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Formal written conjunction meaning 'A, B, as well as C'. Used before the final item in a formal list (parallel to '…, and'). More formal than 还有 or 和 in written Chinese.
examples: 我们接受来料加工、来件加工，以及来样加工。（We accept processing with provided materials, parts, and samples.）
在履行合同阶段，需要检验商品、报关以及投保。（During the contract execution stage, commodity inspection, customs clearance, and obtaining insurance are required.）
交易要经过准备阶段、协商和签订合同阶段、以及履行合同阶段。（A transaction goes through the preparation stage, the negotiation and contract stage, as well as the execution stage.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Formal phrase meaning 'be beneficial to / be conducive to / be advantageous to'. Very common in official, business, and policy writing. The complement is typically an action or outcome noun phrase.
examples: 减少贸易保护主义有利于促进自由贸易。（Reducing trade protectionism is conducive to promoting free trade.）
经济改革的政策有利于经济发展。（Policies of economic reform are beneficial to economic development.）
中国加入世界贸易组织非常有利于我们的业务发展。（China's accession to the WTO is very beneficial to our business development.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Written Chinese conjunction connecting clauses with various relationships: contrast ('but'), addition ('and furthermore'), comparison ('whereas'), or result. More formal than 但是 or 并且. Often appears without a comma before it.
examples: 国内市场的销售提高得很快，而向国外市场的出口还不够理想。（Domestic sales rose rapidly, whereas exports to foreign markets are not yet satisfactory.）

本司主要经营高科技产品的出口，而贵司经营这类产品已有很长历史，所以我们希望能与贵司建立业务合作关系。（Our company deals mainly in high-tech exports, and your company has a long history in this domain, so we hope to establish business cooperation with you.）
上个月，进口额同比增加了10%，而出口额下降了5%。（Last month, imports rose 10% year-on-year, while exports fell 5%.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Formal phrase meaning 'regard X as the main / primarily X / X-dominated'. Specifies the primary component while implying other minor components exist. Very common in business and official Chinese.
examples: 我们以经营电子产品为主。（We deal mainly in electronic products.）
购买这种产品的以中年人为主。（Those who buy this product are primarily middle-aged people.）
主要出口企业是外商投资企业，私营企业以加工贸易方式出口为主。（The main exporters are FIEs; private firms export mainly via processing trade.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Written-Chinese passive structure using 由 to introduce the agent: 'is/was done by [agent]'. More formal than 被 and does not carry a negative connotation. Common in contracts, rules, and official documents.
examples: 定单由顾客填写。（The order form is to be filled out by the customer.）
货物保险由买方负责。（Insurance is to be taken care of by the buyer.）
交易条件由双方磋商决定。（Transaction terms are to be determined by both parties through negotiation.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Semi-formal phrase meaning 'might as well / there's no harm in'. Softens suggestions or recommendations. Slightly less formal than 可以, suggesting the option is low-risk and worth trying.
examples: 你不妨去看一下这家公司的网站。（You might as well take a look at the company's website.）
报上有篇文章正好跟电子商务有关，你们不妨看一看。（There's an article in the paper on e-commerce — you might as well take a look.）
这个问题我们不妨问问王经理。（We might as well ask Manager Wang about this issue.）

grammar_patterns.pattern: 一定 + N / 有一定的 + N
grammar_patterns.explanation: Phrase meaning 'a certain (amount/degree/number of)'. Used to acknowledge the existence or extent of something without specifying precisely. 有一定的X is particularly common in formal writing to hedge assertions.
examples: 每笔生意的情况不同，但也有一定的规律。（Each deal differs, but there is also a certain pattern to them.）
至于交易的盈亏，总是存在一定的风险。（As for a transaction's gains and losses, a certain degree of risk always exists.）
向居民邮寄销售海报起了一定的作用。（Mailing sales posters to residents has had a certain effect.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Preposition phrase meaning 'within [a period or scope]'. Encloses a time period or defined scope. Common in contracts, promotions, and regulations.
examples: 三年内，进出口额提高了25%。（Within three years, the import/export volume rose 25%.）
在促销期间内，所有的商品都减价15%。（During the promotional period, all products are 15% off.）
在合同内，应该写清楚交易条件。（Within the contract, the trade terms should be clearly specified.）

expressions.meaning: joint venture (investment / enterprise)
wholly owned (by one party, typically foreign); sole proprietorship
three types of foreign-funded enterprises: 外资 (purely foreign), 合资 (joint venture), 独资 (wholly foreign-owned)
state-owned enterprise (SOE)
shareholding (joint-stock) enterprise
registered capital
investment proportion / ownership stake ratio
chairman / vice-chairman of the board
business scope / range of operations
trade volume (in monetary terms)
agency trade: acting as agent, handling transactions without taking ownership; earns commission (代理费)
direct/proprietary trade: company buys and sells on its own account, taking ownership and bearing profit/loss
transit trade / entrepôt trade: import from country A then re-export to country C
processing with imported materials (company imports raw materials, manufactures, then exports)
set phrase for four outward-processing arrangements: 来料加工、来样加工、来件加工、补偿贸易
ownership / title (to goods)
profit and loss; gains and losses
charge / collect an agency fee / commission
negotiate, exchange views, discuss terms (more formal/diplomatic than 谈判)
Letter of Credit (L/C)

expressions.zh: 发盘 / 询盘 / 还盘
expressions.pinyin: fā pán / xún pán / huán pán
expressions.meaning: offer/bid / inquiry / counter-offer — the three standard stages of price negotiation in trade
execute / fulfil / perform a contract
clear customs / declare goods at customs (verb-object)
trade protectionism
trade liberalization
in a targeted/focused manner; with a specific target in mind
launch / carry out (a campaign, promotion, activity) — more formal than 搞 or 做
limited company (Ltd.)
your company (polite) / our company — formal abbreviations used in business letters
expressions.register: formal/written business, slightly archaic but still used

expressions.meaning: e-commerce / electronic commerce
bottleneck (structural obstacle to growth)
constrain, restrict, condition (stronger and more formal than 限制)
still completely absent/blank; 'still a total void' — formal idiom for an area where nothing yet exists
year-on-year growth (compared with the same period last year)
new spotlight / new bright spot / new highlight (popular in economic journalism)
one after another; in rapid succession; all at once (distributive, formal/written)
make the list / be included / qualify (for a ranking or competition)
capital turnover / cash flow cycling
reduce costs
up to the present / as of now / so far (formal temporal frame)

essay_takeaways: Use the 瓶颈之一/二/三/四, 没有解决

template when writing a multi-point problem-diagnosis essay. Each numbered section frames the issue as an unresolved question in quotation marks, then elaborates. This is highly idiomatic in Chinese analytical journalism and is directly transferable to business reports.

Open a company capability statement with 不仅是…还可以在…方面与您合作. The 不仅…还 structure lets you establish a primary identity first and then extend into additional value propositions — the standard brochure move.

Use 随着X，Y（也）有所改变/提高/减少 to describe co-evolution of two phenomena in formal writing. The 有所 softens the claim; 随着 marks the causal-temporal link. This pair appears constantly in policy analysis and business commentary.
Deploy 至于 to pivot gracefully between sub-topics within a single discussion — it functions as a formal in-text section marker without requiring a new paragraph. More elegant than 另外 or 还有.
In contracts, official documents, and business letters, use 由 + agent + VP (passive) rather than 被. 由 is neutral and official; 被 often implies an unwanted action. E.g., 交易条件由双方磋商决定 / 货物保险由买方负责.
In formal reports and statistical writing, master the change-reporting formula: 由X提高到Y，增加Z. Pair it with 与上年相比 (year-on-year comparison) or 同比增长X% for journalistic precision.

Use 以…为主 to specify a primary focus while implicitly acknowledging breadth: 我们以出口为主 is more precise and professional than 我们主要做出口, because it acknowledges the entity also does other things but regards this as primary.
In business letters and proposals, use 贵司 / 本司 as polished abbreviations for 'your company' / 'our company'. They signal formal register and are standard in written trade correspondence.
Use 有利于 + VP (not 对…有好处) when arguing in formal prose that a policy, condition, or action is conducive to a desired outcome. 有利于促进贸易自由化 reads as policy-register Chinese; 对贸易有好处 is conversational.

Structure evidence-to-conclusion arguments with 据X（统计/报告/调查），结论. The frame 据海关统计 / 据有关报告 / 据我所知 establishes the evidential source upfront, which is the standard Chinese journalistic and analytical pattern.

Use 首次 (for the first time) + 超过 / 成为 / 达到 to mark milestones in business and economic writing. E.g., 高新技术产品出口首次超过纺织服装产品，成为我国第二大类出口产品. This milestone narrative pattern generates compelling framing for any data point that crosses a threshold.
